---
name: Feature request
about: "New agent (e.g. Critic), new example brief, rubric improvements, loop changes"
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to add or change

<!-- Be specific. "improve evaluator" is not a feature request. -->

## Category

- [ ] New agent type (describe role below)
- [ ] New example brief / reference run
- [ ] Rubric / scoring methodology change
- [ ] Loop orchestration change
- [ ] Other

## If proposing a new agent

**Role:** What does it do in the loop?

**Position in loop:** Where does it run? (before planner / between generator and evaluator / after evaluator / parallel)

**Tools it needs:**

**Why the existing three agents can't cover this:**

## If proposing a rubric change

Which weight or criterion? What's the current behavior and what should change? Include an example of a score that felt wrong.

## Anything else

<!-- Prior art, references, examples from other repos, etc. -->
